children.text: Notice of assumption of police jurisdiction by United States; acceptance by Secretary of further cessions

The Secretary of the Interior shall notify in writing the Governor of the Commonwealth of Kentucky of the passage and approval of this Act, and of the fact that the United States assumes police jurisdiction over the park. Upon the acceptance by the Secretary of the Interior of further cessions of jurisdiction over lands now or hereafter included in the Mammoth Cave National Park, the provisions of sections 2 to 9 inclusive, shall apply to such lands.
This Act, referred to in text, is act

children.tail: , which is classified to sections 404c–1 to 404c–12 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.

children.text: Sections 2 to 9 inclusive, referred to in text, means sections 2 to 9 of act

children.tail: , only sections 2 to 4 of which are still in effect and are classified to sections 404c–2 to 404c–4 of this title.
